description: Reach out to Devon Mychal's team to schedule a 30-min deep dive on Cresta's AI agent product positioning
Add discussion on purposeful design of guides landing page (e.g., hiding competitive content, highlighting thought leadership) to next Web Strategy Sync agenda
Adjust topics in the vertical-specific content cluster to focus on insurance (including healthcare payer) and deprioritize healthcare provider topics
Research potential content topics on AI regulations relevant to contact centers, including volume analysis via SEMrush and Reddit, and propose as a subcluster if viable
